def compute_path(graph, start, end):
    """Returns the weight of the shortest path from start to end in graph."""
    # Initialize the path as the single edge from start to end
    path = [start, end]
    # Compute the weight of the path
    weight = graph[start][end]
    # Compute the weight of the rest of the path
    for i in range(1, len(path)):
        weight += graph[path[i-1]][path[i]]
    # Return the weight and the path
    return weight, path
